text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Oguri. Don'tcha think it's about<n>time ya
folded?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I absolutely will not give in!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Ikayaki is squid fried in batter!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Ikayaki is just plain grilled squid!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What part aren'tcha understandin'?<n>When you
just grill the whole thing<n>plain, it's called
sugatayaki!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hah! See? You can't argue with my<n>perfect squid
logic, so eat your words!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
My apologies. All this talk of eating and<n>squid
made my stomach grumble...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Eh... fine, whatever. Let's drop this for<n>now.
Wanna go to the cafeteria?
